prompt_text: n8n vs Make pricing and features
response:
# n8n vs Make: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Structure**

| Feature | n8n | Make |
|---------|-----|------|
| **Free Tier** | Yes (1 workflow, 30 executions/month) | Yes (1,000 ops/month) |
| **Starter** | $20/month | $9.99/month |
| **Pro** | $48/month | $99/month |
| **Business** | $240/month | $299/month |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Custom |

## **Key Differences**

### **n8n**
**Strengths:**
- ✅ Self-hosted option (open-source)
- ✅ Better for developers/technical users
- ✅ More affordable for high volumes
- ✅ Better visual workflow editor
- ✅ Unlimited executions on paid plans

**Weaknesses:**
- ❌ Steeper learning curve
- ❌ Fewer pre-built templates
- ❌ Smaller app library (~400 integrations)

### **Make (formerly Integromat)**
**Strengths:**
- ✅ More beginner-friendly
- ✅ Larger app ecosystem (~1,000+ integrations)
- ✅ Better templates & community
- ✅ Superior customer support

**Weaknesses:**
- ❌ Cloud-only (no self-hosting)
- ❌ Operations-based pricing (can get expensive)
- ❌ Higher costs at scale

## **Integrations**

| Category | n8n | Make |
|----------|-----|------|
| **Native Integrations** | ~400 | ~1,000+ |
| **APIs** | Good | Excellent |
| **Webhooks** | Yes | Yes |
| **Custom Nodes** | Yes | Limited |

## **When to Choose**

**Choose n8n if:**
- You need self-hosting/privacy
- High workflow volume needed
- Developer expertise available
- Cost is primary concern at scale

**Choose Make if:**
- Beginner-friendly needed
- Need extensive pre-built templates
- Want quick setup
- Prefer managed service

## **Free Trial**

- **n8n**: Self-hosted free plan available
- **Make**: Free tier up to 1,000 operations

Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific aspect?
